title: Image To Image Golden Hour Lakeside Editorial Portrait
sourceTitle: Image To Image Golden Hour Lakeside Editorial Portrait AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Image-to-image golden-hour lakeside editorial portrait using uploaded portrait reference before golden-hour lakeside editorial transformation, preserving adult creative professional with relaxed gaze and clear facial structure. Subject: adult creative professional with relaxed gaze and clear facial structure keeps the same identity, natural face structure, side-profile angle, calm thoughtful expression, seated pose, loose hair, and soft introspective mood while wearing fixed wardrobe or props detail. Scene: fixed target scene detail replaces the indoor room with calm water, blurred trees, sunset reflections, cozy autumn atmosphere, and warm orange-brown editorial tones. Composition: Preserve the uploaded person identity and side-profile seated pose, use a 4:5 magazine-cover portrait crop, shallow depth of field, soft focus, peaceful negative space, and calm storytelling rhythm. Style: Ultra-realistic cinematic editorial portrait photography, dreamy emotional atmosphere, natural skin detail, glowing skin, natural makeup, glossy lips, professional 8K detail, and elegant but not over-styled finish. Color Palette: Fixed warm golden-hour palette with orange, brown, beige knit texture, sunset water reflections, soft skin highlights, and muted autumn neutrals. Lighting: Warm golden-hour side light illuminating one side of the face, gentle shadows, soft highlights on skin and sweater, and bokeh glow across the lake background. Restrictions: Keep the transformed subject coherent, preserve the intended composition, maintain crisp visual detail, use clean readable text when present, and keep the background focused and uncluttered.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
